law_title_en: Decree Adding a Note to Article 36 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه راجع به الحاق يك تبصره بماده 36 آئيننامه اجرائي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: Adds a single note to one article of the executive bylaw implementing Iran's Import/Export Regulations Law, part of the ordinary regulatory machinery governing merchandise trade.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Act on Compensation for Damages and Prevention of Drought-Related Effects
law_title_fa: اصلاح  آيين نامه  اجرايي  قانون  جبران  خسارت  و پيشگيري  عوارض  ناشي از خشكسالي
current_justification_en: Amends the executive bylaw for compensating farmers for drought damage, a government relief mechanism that is directly relevant background whenever crop production or cereal yield charts show a drought-driven dip.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: A 1999 amendment to the executive bylaw of the Import/Export Regulations Law, routine upkeep of the trade-licensing framework.

law_title_en: Resolution on Methods of Share Valuation, Discounts, and the Manner of Price Payment by Buyers
law_title_fa: تصويب نامه راجع به شيوه هاي قيمت گذاري سهام، تخفيف ها و چگونگي پرداخت قيمت توسط خريداران
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies
current_justification_en: A 2003 decree fixing how shares of privatized (Article 44) companies are priced, discounted, and paid for by buyers, part of the administrative machinery of Iran's privatization program that fed listings onto the Tehran Stock Exchange.

law_title_en: Corrective Letter Amending Article 15 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: نامه اصلاحي اصلاحيه ماده  15  آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: A 1999 correction to Article 15 of the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, routine regulatory housekeeping.

law_title_en: Decree Amending Articles 35, 36 and 52 of the Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه راجع به اصلاح مواد 35و 36 و 52 آئيننامه قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: A 1989 amendment to the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, issued as Iran began reopening trade channels after the war, part of the ordinary regulatory backdrop for merchandise trade.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Sale of Smuggled Goods ..., Approved 1374/2/12 (1995) by the Expediency Discernment Council
law_title_fa: آيين  نامه اجرايي نحوه فروش كالاهاي قاچا ... ز، مصوب 1374 2 12 مجمع  تشخيص مصلحت نظام
current_justification_en: A 1995 bylaw governing the sale of smuggled and confiscated goods, a trade-enforcement revenue mechanism that feeds into taxes collected on international trade.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Item 2 of Clause (A) and Clause (B) ... of Note 4 of the General Budget Act for the Year 1379 (2000/01)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي جز  2  بند   الف  و بند ... بصره  4    قانون بودجه سال 1379 كل كشورر
current_justification_en: Executive bylaw implementing one clause of the FY2000 annual budget law, part of the routine machinery by which the budget law's provisions are put into effect.

law_title_en: Addition of a Note to Article 118 of the Executive Bylaw of the Mining Act
law_title_fa: الحاق يك تبصره به ماده  118  آيين نامه اجرايي قانون معادن
targets_named_charts: Value of Mine Production Share by Province
current_justification_en: Adds a note to Article 118 of the Mining Law's executive bylaw in 2017, part of the regulatory framework for the mining sector whose output value by province is tracked from 2018 onward.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Item 4 of Clause (B) of Note 4 of the General Budget Act for the Year 1382 (2003/04)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي جزﺀ  4  بند  ب  تبصره  4  قانون بودجه سال 1382 كل كشور
current_justification_en: A 2003 executive bylaw implementing a budget-law clause tied to an import/export item, linking fiscal policy to trade administration.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه آيين  نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: A 2001 amendment to the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, routine regulatory upkeep during the reformist-era trade liberalization push.

law_title_en: Addition of Article 47 to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations
law_title_fa: الحاق ماده  47  به آيين نامه اجرايي مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: A 1994 addition of an article to the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, part of the ordinary regulatory backdrop for trade during the post-war reconstruction years.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of the National Cooperation Tax for Reconstruction Act
law_title_fa: آئين نامه  اجرايي  قانون  ماليات  تعاون  ملي  براي  بازسازي  مصوب 1367 12 9
current_justification_en: Executive bylaw (1989) implementing the National Cooperation Tax for Reconstruction, a dedicated tax instrument the state legislated right after the Iran-Iraq war ended to fund reconstruction, a genuine addition to the tax base that any account of Iran's tax-revenue trajectory in this period should mention.

law_title_en: Directive on Confirming the Professional Qualification of Managers of Financial Institutions
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل تاييد صلاحيت حرفه اي مديران نهادهاي مالي
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies
current_justification_en: A 2011 directive setting professional-qualification standards for managers of financial institutions, part of the capital-market governance infrastructure underlying Iran's securities markets.

law_title_en: Directive on Market-Making Activity on the Tehran Stock Exchange
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل فعاليت بازار گرداني در بورس اوراق بهادار تهران
targets_named_charts: Stocks traded, turnover ratio of domestic shares
current_justification_en: A 2008 directive governing market-making activity at the Tehran Stock Exchange, a liquidity-provision mechanism that bears on trading volume and turnover.

law_title_en: Directive on Auction-Based Market-Making Activity on Iran Fara Bourse
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل فعاليت بازارگرداني مبتني بر حراج در فرابورس ايران
current_justification_en: A 2014 directive on auction-based market-making at Iran Fara Bourse, the OTC market that expanded the pool of listed/traded companies alongside the main Tehran Stock Exchange.

law_title_en: Removal of Electricity Distribution Companies from Annex No. 3 of the Bylaw Classifying Economic Activities and Enterprises under the General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_title_fa: خروج شركتهاي توزيع نيروي برق از پيوست شم ... ياست هاي كلي اصل چهل و چهارم قانون اساسي
targets_named_charts: Electric power transmission and distribution losses (% of output)
current_justification_en: A 2014 cabinet decree removing electricity distribution companies from the Article 44 privatization annex, keeping them under state ownership rather than transferring them to the private sector, a policy choice that bears directly on the efficiency and reach of the state-run distribution grid.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Note 1 of Article 149 of the Amended Direct Taxes Act (approved 2015)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي تبصره  1  ماده  149  اصلاحي قانون ماليات  هاي مستقيم - مصوب 1394-
targets_named_charts: Taxes on income, profits and capital gains
Taxes on income, profits and capital gains (% of revenue)
current_justification_en: This 2016 bylaw exempts corporate asset-revaluation surpluses (fixed assets, long-term investments, biological assets) from income tax when done under accounting standards, a narrow adjustment to the corporate income-tax base rather than a driver of aggregate tax collection.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 3 of the Act on Increasing Productivity in the Agriculture and Natural Resources Sector, Approved 1389 (2010/11)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  3  قانون افزايش بهره وري بخش كشاورزي و منابع طبيعي - مصوب 1389 -
targets_named_charts: Fertilizer consumption (kilograms per hectare of arable land)
current_justification_en: Executive bylaw for Article 3 of the Agricultural Productivity Increase Law (2015), governing allocation of resources meant to raise farm-sector productivity; a real, named channel into crop yields and output through inputs like fertilizer and irrigation support.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of Amended Note (2) of Article (9) of the Act on Increasing the Productivity of the Agricultural Sector and Natural Resources
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي تبصره (2) اصلاحي ماده (9) قانون افزايش بهره وري بخش كشاورزي و منابع طبيعي
targets_named_charts: Fertilizer consumption (kilograms per hectare of arable land)
current_justification_en: A 2017 amendment narrowing/adjusting Note 2 of the same Agricultural Productivity Increase Law bylaw; shares the parent bylaw's channel into farm productivity but as a technical amendment its own marginal effect is smaller and harder to isolate.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 32 of the Act on the Collection of Certain Government Revenues and Their Expenditure for Specified Purposes, Approved 1369 (1990/91)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده (32) قانون وصول برخي از درآمدهاي دولت و مصرف آن در موارد معين - مصوب 1369 -
current_justification_en: Executive bylaw for Article 32 of the 1990 Law on Collection of Certain Government Revenues, a mechanism letting designated government revenues be collected and spent for specified purposes outside the ordinary budget cycle; a narrow fiscal-technical channel among the broader set of revenue and expenditure rules.

law_title_en: Bylaw on Opening Documentary Letters of Credit under Article 62 of the Public Accounts Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه افتتاح اعتبار اسنادي موضوع ماده  62  قانون محاسبات عمومي كشور
current_justification_en: 1989 bylaw on opening documentary letters of credit under Article 62 of the Public Accounting Law, a procedural rule for how state-sector purchases are financed and settled abroad; touches import execution and the demand for allocated foreign exchange for government imports.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Issuance of Participation Bonds by Bank Maskan under Note 6 of the General Budget Act for the Year 1386 (2007/08)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه انتشار اوراق مشاركت بانك مسكن  ...   تبصره  6  قانون بودجه سال 1386 كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Domestic credit to private sector by banks (% of GDP)
Housing Units by Number of Resident Households, Census Years (1966-2006)
current_justification_en: 2007 bylaw authorizing Bank Maskan to issue mosharekat (participation) bonds under the 1386 budget law, a real financing instrument that expands bank credit for housing construction and mortgage lending.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Formation and Use of the Contingency Reserve of the Export Guarantee Fund of Iran
law_title_fa: آيين نامه چگونگي تشكيل و نحوه استفاده از اندوخته احتياطي صندوق ضمانت صادرات ايران
current_justification_en: 1997 rules on the reserve fund of the Export Guarantee Fund of Iran, Iran's state export-credit insurer; strengthening its reserve capacity supports non-oil exporters' access to credit insurance and thus their ability to sell on credit terms abroad.

law_title_en: Bylaw on Identifying Major Oil Contracts and the Manner of Concluding Them
law_title_fa: آيين نامه تشخيص قراردادهاي مهم نفتي و نحوه انعقاد آنها
current_justification_en: 2017 bylaw defining and governing procedures for approving Iran's most important oil contracts, the legal basis underpinning the Iran Petroleum Contract (IPC) model; it directly shapes the terms under which foreign and domestic investment enters upstream oil and gas fields, which in turn determines future production, exports, and oil-rent flows to the state.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article 11 of Decree No. 153965 ... on Doubtful-Collection Rial and Foreign Currency Claims of Credit Institutions
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده  11  تصويب نامه شماره 153965  ... وك الوصول موسسات اعتباري  ريالي و ارزي
targets_named_charts: Monetary Sector credit to private sector
Claims on private sector (annual growth as % of broad money)
current_justification_en: 2014 amendment strengthening credit institutions' powers to collect overdue rial and foreign-currency claims; affects bank balance-sheet quality and, through recovered capital, banks' capacity to extend new credit to the private sector.

law_title_en: Regulation of the Act on the Three Percent Tax and Municipal Duties
law_title_fa: نظامنامه قانون ماليات صدي سه و عوارض بلدي
current_justification_en: A 1935 regulation implementing a 3% municipal tax and toll charges, an early instrument in the historical foundation of Iran's modern tax and municipal-finance system; included for domain context only.

law_title_en: Directive on the Admission and Offering of Securities on Iran Fara Bourse (Public Joint Stock Company)
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل پذيرش و عرضه اوراق بهادار در فرابورس ايران  شركت سهامي عام
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies (% of GDP)
Stocks traded, total value (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: 2009 directive on listing and offering securities on Iran Fara Bourse, the OTC market created to give smaller and higher-risk companies a listing venue outside the Tehran Stock Exchange; directly expands the number of listed firms and market capitalization.

law_title_en: Executive Directive on the Conduct of Securities Transactions in the Base Market of Fara Bourse
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل اجرايي نحوه انجام معاملات اوراق بهادار در بازار پايه فرابورس
targets_named_charts: Stocks traded, total value (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: 2013 directive setting trading rules for the base (junior) market of Iran Fara Bourse, the lowest listing tier for firms not meeting standard disclosure requirements; broadens market access and trading activity at the margin.

law_title_en: Executive Directive on Futures Contract Transactions on the Iran Mercantile Exchange (Public Joint Stock Company)
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل اجرايي معاملات قراردادهاي آتي در شركت بورس كالاي ايران  سهامي عام
targets_named_charts: Bahar Azadi Gold Coin Price, Rial, Daily (2013-07-22 to 2026-07-11)
Emami Gold Coin Price, Rial, Daily (2010-04-04 to 2026-07-11)
Stocks traded, total value (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: 2008 directive establishing futures-contract trading rules at the Iran Mercantile Exchange (IME), the venue that later became the dominant market for Bahar Azadi and Emami gold-coin futures; the futures market materially shapes spot gold-coin price discovery and volatility in Iran.

law_title_en: Directive on Commodity and Commodity-Based Securities Transactions on the Iran Energy Exchange
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل معاملات كالا و اوراق بهادار مبتني بر  كالا در بورس انرژي
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies (% of GDP)
Stocks traded, total value (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: 2012 directive on commodity and securities trading at the Iran Energy Exchange (IRENEX), which added an organized trading venue for electricity, oil products, and petrochemical-linked instruments to Iran's capital markets.

law_title_en: Rules for Determining the Foreign Currency Needed by Officials Dispatched Abroad
law_title_fa: ضوابط  تعيين ارز مورد نياز مامورين اعزامي به خارج از كشور
current_justification_en: 1994 rules fixing the foreign-currency allocation for Iranian government officials traveling abroad, one small piece of the multi-tier FX-rationing regime that produced large gaps between official and parallel exchange rates in the 1990s.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Implementation of Iran's Agreement with Crude Oil Purchasing Companies
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه اجراي موافقت نامه ايران با شركتهاي خريدار نفت خام
current_justification_en: 1971 law authorizing implementation of Iran's agreement with the crude-oil buyer (Consortium) companies, governing the volumes and terms of Iranian crude exported to foreign buyers during the early-1970s oil-boom years that saw oil revenue surge dramatically.

law_title_en: Act Amending Article 9 of the Charter of the Agricultural Bank of Iran
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح ماده 9 اساسنامه بانك كشاورزي ايران
targets_named_charts: Domestic credit to private sector by banks (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: 1968 amendment to Article 9 of the charter of the Agricultural Bank of Iran (Bank Keshavarzi), the state bank channeling subsidized credit to farmers; supports agricultural investment and, indirectly, crop output and private-sector credit volumes.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Note to Article 29 of the Water Act and the Manner of Its Nationalization
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح تبصره ماده 29 قانون آب و نحوه ملي شدن آن
targets_named_charts: Agricultural irrigated land (% of total agricultural land)
Annual freshwater withdrawals, agriculture (% of total freshwater withdrawal)
current_justification_en: 1976 amendment to Article 29 of Iran's Law on Nationalization of Water, the core legal framework asserting state ownership and allocation authority over water resources nationwide; a national-scale instrument any account of Iranian irrigated agriculture and agricultural water use must reference.

law_title_en: Act on the Customs Duty Exemption for Sheet Glass
law_title_fa: قانون معافيت حقوق گمركي شيشه جام
current_justification_en: 1978 law exempting sheet glass from customs duty, a single-product tariff instrument lowering import costs for that good; part of the much larger set of product-specific tariff changes that together shape aggregate merchandise imports and customs revenue.

law_title_en: Legal Bill on Determining the Maximum Amount of Housing Loans
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني راجع به تعيين حداكثرمبلغ وام مسكن
targets_named_charts: Domestic credit to private sector by banks (% of GDP)
Housing Units by Number of Resident Households, Census Years (1966-2006)
current_justification_en: 1980 bylaw setting the maximum housing loan amount, a direct housing-credit rationing instrument enacted amid post-revolution banking nationalization; caps the volume of mortgage credit individual households could access from state banks.

law_title_en: Decree Extending the Addition of Two Clauses ... to Mining Production Units under the Ministry of Mines and Metals
law_title_fa: تعميم دادن تصويبنامه راجع به الحاق 2 بند ... ليدي معدني  تحت پوشش وزارت معادن و فلزات
current_justification_en: This 1989 cabinet decree extends Article 43 of the import/export regulations bylaw to mineral production units under the Ministry of Mines and Metals, a minor administrative extension of the trade-regulation regime into mining-sector output.

law_title_en: Executive Directive on Emergency Conditions under Article 32 of the Securities Market Act
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل اجرایی شرایط اضطراری موضوع ماده (۳۲) قانون بازار اوراق بهادار
current_justification_en: This 2011 Securities and Exchange Organization directive implements Article 32 of the Securities Market Law, setting rules for halting and reopening trading during emergency market conditions, a mechanism that directly shapes stock-market liquidity, turnover, and volatility.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Provision, Allocation, and Disbursement of Funds for Industrial Engineering Projects
law_title_fa: آئين نامه  اجرائي  تامين  و تخصيص  و پرداخت  اعتبارات  طرحهاي مهندسي  صنعتي
targets_named_charts: Industry (including construction), value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This 1989 bylaw sets procedures for financing, allocating, and disbursing credits to industrial engineering projects, a state-credit channel feeding into industrial-sector investment during the early post-war reconstruction period.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw for Allocating 2% of Crude Oil and Natural Gas Export Revenue to Oil- and Gas-Producing Provinces and Deprived Counties
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي قانون اصلاح جداول شماره ...  گاز خيز و شهرستانها و بخشهاي محروم كشور
current_justification_en: This 2007 bylaw implements a law amending revenue-sharing tables for gas-rich provinces and underprivileged regions, channeling a share of natural-gas revenue into regional development budgets.

law_title_en: Decree Adding a Note to Article 3 ... Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act for the Current Year
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه راجع به الحاق يك تبصره بماده 3 ... ائي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات سالجاري
current_justification_en: This 1986 cabinet decree adds a note to Article 3 of the import/export regulations bylaw, a minor procedural amendment within Iran's core annual trade-licensing regime.

law_title_en: Decree on the Import Duty Tables Annex, Based on the Nomenclature Table, Replacing the Tables Annexed to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويب نامه راجع به جداول حقوق ورودي پيوست بر اساس جدول نمانكاتور جايگزين جداول پيوست آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرا
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
current_justification_en: This 2003 cabinet decision approves the import-duty tariff schedule tables annexed to the import/export regulations bylaw, the direct legal instrument setting Iran's applied tariff rates for that year.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Sale of Mineral Materials
law_title_fa: آيين نامه فروش مواد معدني
current_justification_en: This 1984 bylaw governs the terms of sale of mineral materials extracted under state oversight, a direct pricing and allocation mechanism for domestic mineral output.

law_title_en: Amendment to Note (6) Added to Amended Article (8) of the Executive Bylaw on the Manner of Using Land and National Resources in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره (6) الحاقي به ماده (8) اصلاحي آيين نامه اجرايي نحوه استفاده از زمين و منابع ملي در مناطق آزاد تجاري - صنعتي
current_justification_en: This 2018 amendment revises a clause of the Free Trade-Industrial Zones Law governing economic incentives inside Iran's free zones, part of the legal framework meant to attract investment into those zones.

law_title_en: Decisions Regarding the Tables Annexed to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اتخاذ تصميماتي در خصوص جداول پيوست آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, simple mean, all products
current_justification_en: This 2008 cabinet decision revises the tariff schedule tables annexed to the import/export regulations bylaw, directly resetting Iran's applied import tariff rates for that year.

law_title_en: Decree Adding Certain Phrases to a Part ... Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويبنامه راجع به الحاق عباراتي به قسمت  ... نامه اجرائي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1990 cabinet decree inserts wording into the import/export regulations implementing bylaw, a minor procedural amendment to the annual trade-licensing regime during the early post-war period.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Amended Article 12 of the Participation Bonds Issuance Act of 1379
law_title_fa: آيين نامه  اجرايي  ماده  12 اصلاحي  قانون  نحوه  انتشار اوراق  مشاركت مصوب  1379
current_justification_en: This 2002 bylaw implements Article 12 of the 2000 Law on the Issuance of Participation (Musharakah) Bonds, the legal machinery enabling Iran's sharia-compliant corporate and government bond market.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 210 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... Directive of the National Iranian Oil Products Distribution Company
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 210 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادا ... دستورالعمل شركت ملي پخش فرآورده هاي نفتي
current_justification_en: This 2006 Administrative Justice Court ruling annuls a directive of the National Iranian Oil Products Distribution Company, touching the rules governing domestic fuel distribution and pricing.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 184 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... dated 28/1/1380 (2001) of the Supreme Council for Non-Oil Exports
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 184 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادا ... ورخ 28 1 1380 شوراي عالي صادرات غير نفتي
current_justification_en: This 2006 Administrative Justice Court ruling concerns a 2001 decision of the Supreme Council of Non-Oil Exports, Iran's top export-promotion body, touching the institutional framework for non-oil export policy.

law_title_en: Rulings No. 411, 410 and 409 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court on the Annulment of Part of Cabinet Resolution No. 54810/T/26084 and Social Security Organization Circular No. 35 on Pensions
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 411، 410، 409 هيأت عمومي ديوان ...  شماره 35 مستمريهاي سازمان تأمين اجتماعي
targets_named_charts: Social Security Organization Pensioners & Amounts Paid, by Category (1991-2006)
current_justification_en: This 2004 Administrative Justice Court ruling addresses Social Security Organization pension table No. 35, the schedule that directly sets pension payout amounts for SSO beneficiaries.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 145 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court on the Implementation of Land Reform Regulations
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 145 هيئت عمومي ديوان عدالت اداري درخصوص اجراي مقررات اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: This 1998 Administrative Justice Court ruling addresses implementation of Iran's land-reform regulations (from the 1960s Pahlavi-era reform), governing agricultural land ownership and distribution that reshaped the country's arable-land structure.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 145 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court on the Implementation of Land Reform Regulations
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 145 هيئت عمومي ديوان عدالت اداري درخصوص اجراي مقررات اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: Land reform is one of the Pahlavi state's central national-scale modernization instruments; any serious account of Iran's GDP path in the 1960s-70s must mention it, even though this particular document is only a later court ruling on its implementation.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 187 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... Operational Regulations and General Conditions of Water and Wastewater Tariffs
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 187 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادا ... ياتي و شرايط عمومي تعرفه هاي آب و فاضلاب
current_justification_en: This 2004 Administrative Justice Court ruling addresses the terms and general conditions of water and wastewater tariffs, a regulated household utility price that feeds into the consumer price index.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 65 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court Regarding the Annulment of Circular No. 10/30/10870 Dated 27/2/1379 (May 17, 2000) (Tariff No. 3, Agricultural Production) of the Ministry of Energy
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 65 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت اداري در خصوص ابطال بخشنامه شماره 10/30/10870 مورخ 27/2/1379 (تعرفه شماره 3 توليد كش
targets_named_charts: Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This 2005 Administrative Justice Court ruling addresses Ministry of Energy tariff table No. 3, covering electricity and water pricing for agricultural production, a direct input-cost channel for the farm sector.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 61 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court ... Board of Directors of the Post Company Concerning Telecommunications Service Tariffs
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 61 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادار ... يره شركت پست درخصوص تعرفه خدمات مخابراتي
current_justification_en: This 1995 Administrative Justice Court ruling addresses the Post Company's telecommunications service tariffs, a regulated communications price feeding into the price index and telecom-sector cost structure.

law_title_en: Act on Charging the Revenue from Oil Exports to Final Expenditure for Provincial Development Activities
law_title_fa: قانون به هزينه قطعي منظور نمودن درآمد موضوع لايحه قانوني راجع به تخصيص معادل يك روز درآمد حاصل از‌صادرات نفت براي فعاليت
targets_named_charts: Capital Expenditure Budget Execution Share by Province
Current Expenditure Budget Execution Share by Province
Total Country Budget: Resources & Uses Breakdown (SH1385-1400)
current_justification_en: This 2001 law permanently earmarks a share of oil export revenue as final expenditure for provincial development projects, one of a series of recurring statutory mechanisms that route oil income into subnational capital and current budgets.

law_title_en: Act on the Issuance of Title Deeds for Lands Subject to Land Reform in Covered Villages and Towns
law_title_fa: قانون صدور اسناد مالكيت اراضي مشمول اصلاحات ارضي در روستاها و شهرهاي مشمول
current_justification_en: The law authorizes issuing formal ownership titles for rural and urban land affected by the land-reform program, directly formalizing property rights that underlie later measures of housing/land tenure type.

law_title_en: Act on the Issuance of Title Deeds for Lands Subject to Land Reform in Covered Villages and Towns
law_title_fa: قانون صدور اسناد مالكيت اراضي مشمول اصلاحات ارضي در روستاها و شهرهاي مشمول
targets_named_charts: Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This law formalizes the property-rights leg of Iran's land-reform program, a central plank of the Pahlavi-era modernization drive that any serious account of Iran's growth path and agricultural value added in this period must mention.

law_title_en: Act Adding One Article to the Participation Bonds Issuance Act, as Amended
law_title_fa: قانون الحاق یک ماده به قانون نحوه انتشار اوراق مشارکت با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: Participation bonds (اوراق مشارکت) let government and public entities raise financing from the public rather than borrowing directly from the central bank; this clause expands the legal basis for that instrument, a channel bearing on the trajectory of government debt to the central bank and net government debt.

law_title_en: Act on the Merger of State-Owned Joint-Stock Companies Engaged in Poultry Production and Breeding
law_title_fa: قانون ادغام شركتهاي سهامي دولتي كه در زمينه توليد و پرورش طيور فعاليت مي نمايند
targets_named_charts: Meat of chickens, fresh or chilled, Production
current_justification_en: Mandates merging state-owned poultry production and breeding companies into consolidated entities, directly restructuring the supply-side organization of Iran's poultry sector.

law_title_en: Act Amending the Salary Table and Payment Rules for Employees Covered by the Civil Servants Employment Act and Judges
law_title_fa: قانون تغيير جدول حقوق و ضوابط پرداخت مستخدمين مشمول قانون استخدام كشوري و قضات
current_justification_en: Directly revises the statutory pay schedule and payment rules for employees covered by the Civil Service Employment Law and for judges, a direct legal driver of the government wage bill captured in compensation of employees.

law_title_en: Act Amending Article 15 of the Act on Division ... Lease to Tenant Farmers, Approved Dey 1347 (1968/69)
law_title_fa: قانون راجع به اصلاح ماده 15 قانون تقسيم  ...  اجاره به زارعين مستأجر مصوب دي ماه 1347
targets_named_charts: Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Amends the article governing conversion of leased agricultural land to tenant farmers (زارعین مستأجر), a continuing implementation step of Iran's land-reform program, a national-scale policy that any serious account of agricultural value added and Iran's growth path must mention.

law_title_en: Act Extending Various Deadlines Prescribed under the Act ... Land Leased to Tenant Farmers in Special Cases
law_title_fa: قانون تمديد مهلت مواعد مختلف مقرر در قان ... ك مورد اجاره بزارعين مستاجر در موارد خاص
targets_named_charts: Agriculture, forestry, and fishing, value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Extends the various statutory deadlines for converting leased land held by tenant farmers, a continuing implementation step of Iran's land-reform program, a national-scale policy that any serious account of agricultural value added and Iran's growth path must mention.

law_title_en: Act Obligating the Government to Spend Funds from the 1386 (2007/08) National Budget on Rural Gas Supply
law_title_fa: قانون الزام دولت به هزينه كرد اعتبار مربوط به افزايش بيست (20) ريال به قيمت فروش گاز بر اساس بند (و) تبصره (11) قانون بو
targets_named_charts: Access to clean fuels and technologies for cooking, rural (% of rural population)
Access to clean fuels and technologies for cooking (% of population)
current_justification_en: Legally obligates the government to actually spend the FY1386 budget credit earmarked for extending natural-gas service to villages, a direct funding-execution driver of rural access to clean cooking fuel.

law_title_en: Act on Financing the Budget Shortfall of Hospitals for the National Health and Treatment Network Development Plan
law_title_fa: قانون تأمين كسري اعتبار بيمارستانها، برنامه بيمه درمان كارمندان دولت و طرح توسعه شبكه هاي بهداشتي و درماني كشور
targets_named_charts: Domestic general government health expenditure (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Covers a funding shortfall for hospitals and for the health-network development plan, a direct fiscal instrument bearing on hospital-bed capacity and the government share of health expenditure.

law_title_en: Customs Circular on the Import Duty Rate for Automobiles under Clause (r) of Note One of the National Budget Act for 1404 (2025)
law_title_fa: بخنشنامه گمرك در خصوص نرخ حقوق ورودي خودرو بند  ر  تبصره  يك  قانون بودجه سال 1404
targets_named_charts: Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, all products
Tariff rate, applied, weighted mean, manufactured products
current_justification_en: A customs circular directly setting the import-duty rate for vehicles under a specific budget-law note, an explicit tariff instrument on a manufactured product category feeding into the economy-wide applied tariff averages.

law_title_en: Customs Circular on the Import Duty Rate for Automobiles under Clause (r) of Note One of the National Budget Act for 1404 (2025)
law_title_fa: بخنشنامه گمرك در خصوص نرخ حقوق ورودي خودرو بند  ر  تبصره  يك  قانون بودجه سال 1404
current_justification_en: As a customs duty rate on a specific imported good, this circular is one of many rate-setting instruments feeding total customs and other import-duty revenue.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Extraction and Sale of Mines by the Private Sector
law_title_fa: آيين نامه استخراج و فروش معادن توسط بخش خصوصي
current_justification_en: This 1984 bylaw establishes the regulatory framework allowing private-sector actors to extract and sell mineral products, a foundational rule for private participation across Iran's mining sector.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 1423 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court: Annulment of the Absolute Application of Clause 41-4 of the Ministry of Energy's Operational Bylaw and General Conditions for Water and Wastewater Tariffs
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 1423 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت اداري با موضوع: ابطال اطلاق بند 41-4 آيين نامه عملياتي و شرايط عمومي تعرفه هاي آب
targets_named_charts: Consumer Price Index by COICOP Group (1395=100, SH1390-1399)
current_justification_en: This Administrative Justice Court ruling annuls a ministry circular setting water and wastewater tariffs, directly altering the legal basis for a regulated utility price captured within the housing/utilities COICOP group of the CPI.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 1423 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court: Annulment of the Absolute Application of Clause 41-4 of the Ministry of Energy's Operational Bylaw and General Conditions for Water and Wastewater Tariffs
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 1423 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت اداري با موضوع: ابطال اطلاق بند 41-4 آيين نامه عملياتي و شرايط عمومي تعرفه هاي آب
current_justification_en: As a ruling that blocks a regulated utility price increase, it has a marginal, diffuse effect on overall consumer price inflation alongside the far larger drivers of Iran's inflation (exchange rate, liquidity growth, sanctions).

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1323 (1944/45) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال يكهزار وسيصد و بيست وسه  مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: Iran's national annual budget law for the Iranian year 1323 (1944) is the formal legal instrument setting central government revenue and expenditure during the difficult wartime and immediate post-occupation period (Allied occupation, famine, currency instability). Any account of Iran's Government Finance series in this era must recognize the annual budget law as the primary legal channel authoriz

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1323 (1944/45) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال يكهزار وسيصد و بيست وسه  مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: As the national budget law for a wartime year, it is a national-scale fiscal instrument that any serious account of Iran's GDP trajectory in the 1940s should mention alongside the occupation-driven inflation and supply shocks of the period.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1327 (1948/49) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1327 مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: Iran's national annual budget law for FY1327 (1948) is the primary legal instrument setting central government revenue and expenditure for that year, in the early Pahlavi period just before oil revenues began to dominate state finance. It is the formal legal channel through which that year's taxation and spending levels were authorized.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1327 (1948/49) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1327 مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: As a national annual budget law it is a country-scale fiscal instrument that belongs in any serious account of Iran's GDP path in the late 1940s, alongside the shift toward a more assertive state role in the economy that characterized the period.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1328 (1949/50) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال يكهزار و سيصدو بيست و هشت مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: Iran's national annual budget law for FY1328 (1949) is the legal instrument authorizing central government revenue and expenditure that year, during the pre-nationalization era when the Anglo-Iranian Oil Company royalty dispute was already straining state finances.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1328 (1949/50) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال يكهزار و سيصدو بيست و هشت مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: As the national budget for the year immediately preceding the oil nationalization crisis, this law is part of the national-scale fiscal backdrop that any serious account of Iran's GDP path around 1949-1951 should mention.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1333 (1954/55) of the Senate
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1333 مجلس سنا
current_justification_en: This Senate-passed national annual budget law for FY1333 (1954/55) set central government revenue and expenditure just after the 1953 change of government and the 1954 Consortium Agreement that restored Iranian oil exports, a pivotal moment for reviving state oil income.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1333 (1954/55) of the Senate
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1333 مجلس سنا
current_justification_en: As the national budget for the year the Consortium Agreement restored oil exports, this law is part of the national-scale fiscal and institutional backdrop that shaped Iran's growth recovery in the mid-1950s and belongs in any account of the GDP chart for this period.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1339 (1960/61) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1339 مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: Iran's national annual budget law for FY1339 (1960) authorized central government revenue and expenditure during the Second Seven-Year Development Plan period, when oil revenue was increasingly channeled into planned industrial and infrastructure investment through the Plan Organization.

law_title_en: Budget Act for the Year 1339 (1960/61) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1339 مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: As the national budget during the Second Development Plan, this law is a national-scale fiscal instrument that any serious account of Iran's GDP and investment path around 1960 should mention alongside the Plan Organization's development spending.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for Year 1349
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1349 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Iran's national annual budget law for FY1349 (1970) authorized central government revenue and expenditure on the eve of the 1970s oil-price boom, during the Fourth Development Plan's push for industrialization and import-substitution.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for Year 1349
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1349 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As the national budget for a year on the cusp of the oil boom, this law is part of the national-scale fiscal backdrop for Iran's rapid growth acceleration of the early-to-mid 1970s and belongs in any serious account of the GDP chart for this period.

law_title_en: Supplementary Budget Act for 1983-84 (1362)
law_title_fa: قانون متمم بودجه سال 1362 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This supplementary budget law (متمم بودجه) for FY1362 (1983) directly increased authorized government spending mid-year during the Iran-Iraq War, when war costs and revolutionary-state expansion were driving repeated upward revisions to the annual budget.

law_title_en: Supplementary Budget Act for 1983-84 (1362)
law_title_fa: قانون متمم بودجه سال 1362 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As a war-economy fiscal measure, this supplementary budget is part of the national-scale wartime spending expansion that any serious account of Iran's GDP path during the Iran-Iraq War must mention alongside oil-export disruption and war destruction.

law_title_en: Supplementary Budget Act for 1983-84 (1362)
law_title_fa: قانون متمم بودجه سال 1362 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Deficit-financed wartime supplementary spending of this kind, largely monetized through central bank credit to the government, is a documented contributor to the acceleration of Iranian inflation during and after the war.

law_title_en: Textual Correction to the Act Amending Certain Figures and Notes of the 1988-89 (1367) National Budget Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه عبارتي قانون  اصلاح  برخي  از ارقام  و تبصره هاي  قانون  بودجه  سال  1367 كل  كشور
current_justification_en: This amendment correcting figures and clauses of the FY1367 (1988) national budget law directly revised authorized government revenue and expenditure during the final, most fiscally strained year of the Iran-Iraq War.

law_title_en: Textual Correction to the Act Amending Certain Figures and Notes of the 1988-89 (1367) National Budget Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه عبارتي قانون  اصلاح  برخي  از ارقام  و تبصره هاي  قانون  بودجه  سال  1367 كل  كشور
current_justification_en: As a fiscal-correction measure in the final year of the war, this amendment is part of the national-scale wartime and immediate pre-reconstruction fiscal backdrop relevant to Iran's GDP trough of the late 1980s.

law_title_en: Textual Correction to the Act Amending Certain Figures and Notes of the 1988-89 (1367) National Budget Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه عبارتي قانون  اصلاح  برخي  از ارقام  و تبصره هاي  قانون  بودجه  سال  1367 كل  كشور
current_justification_en: Budget revisions during this most fiscally strained war year reflect and reinforced the deficit monetization that is documented as a driver of Iran's high inflation of the late 1980s.

law_title_en: Act Amending the 1990 National Budget Act
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح قانون بودجه سال 1369 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This amendment to the FY1369 (1990) national budget law directly revised authorized government revenue and expenditure in the first full budget year after the Iran-Iraq War ceasefire, as the state pivoted toward the First Post-War Development Plan's reconstruction spending.

law_title_en: Act Amending the 1990 National Budget Act
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح قانون بودجه سال 1369 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As part of the first post-ceasefire budget cycle, this amendment is part of the national-scale fiscal reorientation toward reconstruction that any serious account of Iran's GDP rebound in the early 1990s should mention.

law_title_en: Act Amending the 1990 National Budget Act
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح قانون بودجه سال 1369 كل كشور
current_justification_en: Post-war reconstruction spending financed partly through budget deficits and central bank credit is documented as contributing to the persistently high inflation of the early 1990s, even as growth recovered.

law_title_en: Final Budget Settlement Act for the Year 1346 (1967/68) of the National Consultative Assembly
law_title_fa: قانون تفريغ بودجه سال 1346 مجلس شوراي ملي
current_justification_en: This budget closing account (تفريغ بودجه) for FY1346 (1967/68) is the Majlis's ex-post certification of actual government revenue and expenditure outturns for that year, providing the realized-outcome counterpart to the year's budget law.

law_title_en: Decree on the Addition of Clause (dh) to Article (2) of the Executive Bylaw on the Collection of Charges in the Free Trade-Industrial Zones of the Islamic Republic of Iran
law_title_fa: تصويب نامه در خصوص الحاق بند (ذ) به ماده (2) آيين نامه اجرايي اخذ عوارض در مناطق آزاد تجاري ـ صنعتي جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: This 2014 decree adds a clause to the executive regulations of Iran's Free Trade-Industrial Zones Law, adjusting the customs/tariff instruments available inside zones such as Kish, Qeshm and Chabahar, which is part of the trade-policy apparatus behind Iran's recorded import and export flows.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Act on Compensation for Damages and Prevention of Effects Caused by Drought
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي قانون جبران خسارات و پيشگيري عوارض ناشي از خشكسالي
current_justification_en: This 2000 amendment to the drought-damage compensation bylaw is a real transfer mechanism that cushions farm households and agricultural output after drought shocks, giving it a plausible, if narrow, link to farm production and rural social-protection outcomes.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Bylaw on the Method of Selling Low-Cost Housing under Note 39 of the Budget Act for the Year 1364 (1985/86)
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه نحوه فروش خانه هاي ارزان قيمت موضوع تبصره 39 قانون بودجه سال 1364
targets_named_charts: Housing Units by Number of Resident Households, Census Years (1966-2006)
current_justification_en: This 1985 amendment governs the sale terms of subsidised low-cost housing units built under the 1364 (1985/86) budget law, a concrete instrument affecting the stock and turnover of low-income housing recorded in Iran's census-based housing statistics.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1994 amendment revises the executive bylaw of Iran's Import/Export Regulations Law, the core administrative instrument governing which goods may be traded and under what customs terms, so it forms part of the regulatory backdrop to Iran's merchandise trade and customs-revenue series.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1997 amendment further revises the same executive bylaw of the Import/Export Regulations Law, continuing the incremental tightening or loosening of Iran's customs and trade-licensing terms that underlie its recorded import and export series.

law_title_en: Amendment to Note 1 of the Amended Article 15 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره  1  ماده  15  اصلاحي آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1998 amendment changes note 1 of Article 15 of the Import/Export Regulations bylaw, a specific customs-procedure clause within the law that structures Iran's trade-licensing regime.

law_title_en: Amendment to Note 4 of Article 37 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح تبصره 4 ماده 37 آئيننامه اجرائي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1991 amendment revises note 4 of Article 37 of the same Import/Export Regulations bylaw, another procedural adjustment within Iran's standing trade-licensing and customs framework.
